Exception Reason: Passwords are HMAC-derived by the proxy, not user-chosen. Complexity requirements are unnecessary for deterministic passwords.
Rule Info: The Cognito user pool does not have a password policy that minimally specify a password length of at least 8 characters, as well as requiring uppercase, numeric, and special characters.

Exception Reason: Users are service identities auto-provisioned from channel user IDs (e.g. telegram:12345). MFA is not applicable for non-interactive accounts.
Rule Info: The Cognito user pool does not require MFA.

Exception Reason: Advanced security mode (WAF integration) adds cost with no benefit for programmatic-only service identities. All auth is admin-initiated.
Rule Info: The Cognito user pool does not have AdvancedSecurityMode set to ENFORCED.
